titleStmt.title: SII 22.419: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 419. (A.R. No. 419 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, ŚĪVALAPPĒRI. AḺAGAR TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL RĀJARĀJA I—24th YEAR (1008-09 A.D.)

summary.p: The inscribed stones are built out of order. The epigraph begins with introduction Tirumagaḷpōla etc. It records a gift (of money ?) by Araiyaṉ Kumaraṉ of Paṉaṅguḍi in Paṭṭiṉakkūṟṟam a division of Kshatriyaśikhāmaṇivaḷanāḍu on the southern side of the Kāvēri river in Śōḻanāḍu, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirumāliruñjōlai-Dēvar. The writing is Vaṭṭeḻuttu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷpola perunilaccelviyun taṉakke Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyu
m kuṭamalaināṭum kollamum kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻa maṇṭalamun taṇṭāṟkoṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻiyuḷ Ellāyāṇṭum toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻi
yarait tecukoḷ śrī kovirājarājarājakecari paṉmarākiya śrī rājarāja tevarkku yāṇṭu Irupattu nāṉkāvatu coḻanāṭṭu kāviriyiṉ teṉkaraik kattiracikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭup paṭṭiṉa
kkūṟṟattup paṉattuppaṉaṅkuṭip paṉaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṅ kumaraṉ vaicca tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟu Ivviḷakkut tirumāliruñcolai tevarkku Aṉṟu tiruvārātaṉañ ce
vvikkakaṭavāre Ittiruviḷakku muṭṭāmal Erikkakkaṭavar .—
Digital edition of SII 22.419 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
